--- insert_on_conflict_do_update.sql
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT (foo) DO UPDATE SET bar = 3
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 17,
      NameEnd: 20,
      Name:    "foo",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 22,
      NameEnd: 25,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.ValuesInput{
    Values: 27,
    Rows:   []*ast.ValuesRow{
      &ast.ValuesRow{
        Lparen: 34,
        Rparen: 39,
        Exprs:  []*ast.DefaultExpr{
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 35,
              ValueEnd: 36,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "1",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 38,
              ValueEnd: 39,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "2",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  OnConflict: &ast.OnConflict{
    On:             41,
    ConflictTarget: &ast.ConflictTargetColumns{
      Lparen:  53,
      Rparen:  57,
      Columns: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 54,
          NameEnd: 57,
          Name:    "foo",
        },
      },
    },
    ConflictAction: &ast.ConflictActionDoUpdate{
      Do:          59,
      UpdateItems: []*ast.UpdateItem{
        &ast.UpdateItem{
          Path: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 73,
              NameEnd: 76,
              Name:    "bar",
            },
          },
          DefaultExpr: &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 79,
              ValueEnd: 80,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "3",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT (foo) DO UPDATE SET bar = 3
